## Summary

Adds a documentation-only PR 1 contract for the Two-Minute Seed workstream.

Primary contract file:

- `docs/canon/SEED_CONTRACT_GUARDRAILS_V1.md`

This PR intentionally does **not** add runtime behavior, database schema, prompt execution, Phase 2 routing, or any seed-to-authority path.

## Doctrine locked here

- `accepted_story_ledger_v1` remains the existing persisted governing artifact.
- “Golden Record” is doctrine language only and maps to `accepted_story_ledger_v1`.
- Seed outputs may shape downstream work, but may not authorize downstream truth.
- Artifact-level lifecycle state is separate from claim-level verification state.
- Phase 2 must not trust seed output directly in this PR.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] Documentation/contracts only
- [x] No runtime execution
- [x] No Phase 2 routing changes
- [x] No seed claim used as canon
- [x] No new code term replacing `accepted_story_ledger_v1`
- [x] Artifact state and claim state are explicitly separate

## Notes

This is deliberately small so GitHub/engineering can review the governance language before any implementation PRs add seed artifacts or runtime consumers.
